Title: Address Validation Management
CapabilityDescription: Validating addresses against authoritative sources such as GNAF to ensure they are accurate and deliverable.

CapabilityDescription: Customer Digital Onboarding Management is the capability to enable a customer to establish a verified, digital relationship with the SRO through self‑service channels. It supports customer‑initiated registration, identity verification, record matching, de

Title: Customer Identification Management
CapabilityDescription: Customer Identification Management is the capability to uniquely identify, distinguish, and reference customers by collecting, matching, validating, and managing identifying information across internal and external data sources.

Title: Joint Ownership
CapabilityDescription: Manage land owned by more than one party, including proportional interests and lead-owner assignment.

Title: Land Held on Trust
CapabilityDescription: Manage land ownership where land is held under trust arrangements, capturing trustee and beneficiary relationships.

Title: Ownership Maintenance
CapabilityDescription: Maintain ownership details and ownership changes over time so the correct party is held liable.

Title: Ownership Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing the link between properties and their registered owners within the revenue system.

Title: Property Creation
CapabilityDescription: Creating new property records in the system from data received via third-party feeds or manual staff entry.

Title: Subdivision/Consolidation Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing property record changes arising from subdivision or consolidation events.

Title: Subdivisions & Consolidations
CapabilityDescription: Manage changes to land parcels resulting from subdivision or consolidation, and update taxable land records accordingly.

Title: Taxable Land Maintenance
CapabilityDescription: Maintain records of land that is subject to Land Tax, ensuring only qualifying land is included in assessments.

Title: Title to Property Relationship
CapabilityDescription: Maintain the relationship between legal land titles and property records, ensuring title changes are reflected in the system.

Title: Unknown Customer
CapabilityDescription: Manage land or ownership records where the liable party is not yet identified, flagging for investigation.

Title: Valuation Data Acquisition
CapabilityDescription: Receiving and ingesting valuation data from the Valuer-General and other authoritative sources.

Title: Valuation Data Management
CapabilityDescription: Maintaining the accuracy and completeness of valuation records used in assessment calculations.

Title: Concession Application
CapabilityDescription: Receiving and processing applications for land tax concessions including eligibility assessment and approval.

Title: Determine Land Tax Liability
CapabilityDescription: Determine whether Land Tax applies to specific land and how liability is calculated, including thresholds and exemptions.

Title: Exemption Creation Management
CapabilityDescription: Defining and configuring exemption types available under the Land Tax Act, including eligibility criteria and duration.

Title: Joint Ownership
CapabilityDescription: Determine tax treatment for land owned jointly, applying the correct grouping and rate rules.

Title: Land Held on Trust
CapabilityDescription: Determine tax treatment for land held under trust arrangements, applying trust-specific rates and surcharges.

Title: Tax/Entitlement Rate Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing the land tax rates applicable to different taxpayer types and ownership categories.

Title: Usage Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing information about how a property is occupied and used, which affects land tax exemption and concession eligibility.

Title: Assessment Generation Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing the process of generating assessment notices from calculated liabilities.

Title: Automated Communication Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing system-generated outbound communications triggered by assessment events. Includes rules for which channel is used for which communication type

Title: General Valuations
CapabilityDescription: Apply standard Valuer-General valuation data for the annual Land Tax assessment cycle.

Title: Generate Land Tax Assessments
CapabilityDescription: Generate Land Tax assessment outcomes using validated liability calculations and valuation data.

Title: SRO Requested Valuations
CapabilityDescription: Manage valuations specifically requested by SRO to support assessment decisions.

Title: Single Valuation for Multiple Properties
CapabilityDescription: Apply a single valuation across related properties where appropriate under the Land Tax Act.

Title: Supplementary Valuations
CapabilityDescription: Apply updated valuations when land circumstances change between general valuation cycles.

Title: Valuations Maintenance
CapabilityDescription: Maintain valuation data used for Land Tax assessment, including updates from the Valuer-General.

Title: Assessment Cancellation Management
ValueStageName: Land Tax Obligations Formally Established & Communicated
CapabilityDescription: Managing the cancellation of assessment notices that have been issued in error or superseded.

Title: Assessment Withdrawal Management
ValueStageName: Land Tax Obligations Formally Established & Communicated
CapabilityDescription: Managing the formal withdrawal of issued assessment notices.

Title: Communication Preference/Consent Management
ValueStageName: Land Tax Obligations Formally Established & Communicated
CapabilityDescription: Extends beyond just “electronic consent” to capture consent per channel (a customer may consent to email but not SMS)

Title: Customer Communication Record Management
ValueStageName: Land Tax Obligations Formally Established & Communicated
CapabilityDescription: Recording and maintaining a history of all communications with customers.

Title: Issue Cycle Management
ValueStageName: Land Tax Obligations Formally Established & Communicated

Title: Issue Land Tax Assessments
ValueStageName: Land Tax Obligations Formally Established & Communicated
CapabilityDescription: Issue formal Land Tax assessments to customers, giving legal effect to the tax obligation.

Title: Service of Notice Management
ValueStageName: Land Tax Obligations Formally Established & Communicated
CapabilityDescription: Managing the formal service of assessment notices to customers, including electronic and postal channels.

Title: Adjustment Management
CapabilityDescription: Apply financial adjustments to Land Tax liabilities following reassessment, amendment, or correction.

Title: Instalment Management
CapabilityDescription: Manage instalment arrangements for paying Land Tax, including schedule setup and monitoring.

Title: Payment Allocation Management
CapabilityDescription: Allocate payments to the correct Land Tax liabilities at customer and property levels.

Title: Payment Management
CapabilityDescription: Receive and manage Land Tax payments from customers across all payment channels.

Title: Penalty Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing penalties applied for late lodgement or payment of Land Tax.

Title: Refund Data Management
CapabilityDescription: Maintaining records of refund transactions and supporting documentation.

Title: Refund Management
CapabilityDescription: Process refunds arising from overpayment or reassessment of Land Tax.

Title: Suspense Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing unallocated or unidentified payments held in suspense pending correct allocation.

Title: Assessment Objection Management
CapabilityDescription: Manage formal objections to Land Tax assessment decisions, including receipt, review and determination.

Title: Audit Management
CapabilityDescription: Conduct audit activities to validate correctness and compliance with land tax obligations.

Title: Case Creation
CapabilityDescription: Creating new cases to track complex land tax matters, private rulings and referrals.

Title: Case Management
CapabilityDescription: Manage Land Tax cases across their full lifecycle including creation, tracking and closure.

Title: Compliance Management
CapabilityDescription: Monitor and address non-compliance with Land Tax obligations, including proactive and reactive activities.

Title: Dispute Resolution Management
CapabilityDescription: Resolve disputes arising from Land Tax matters, including VCAT referrals and settlements.

Title: Insolvency Relationship Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing land tax obligations and debt recovery for customers who are subject to insolvency proceedings.

Title: Quality Assurance Management
CapabilityDescription: Ensure accuracy and consistency of Land Tax decisions through sampling and review activities.

Title: Risk Management
CapabilityDescription: Identify and manage risks associated with Land Tax administration.

Title: Valuation Objection Management
CapabilityDescription: Manage objections relating specifically to land valuations used in Land Tax assessments.

Title: Interest Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing interest charges applied to overdue Land Tax liabilities.

Title: Write Off Management
CapabilityDescription: Managing the write-off of Land Tax debts deemed irrecoverable.

Title: Certificate Evidence & Record Management
CapabilityDescription: Maintain records and evidence supporting issued certificates, including liability outstanding at issue.

Title: Issue Land Tax Certificates
CapabilityDescription: Issue certificates confirming Land Tax status for land, used in property settlement and conveyancing.
